title: Ensure AssertJ methods setting the assertion context come before an assertion
description: Describing, setting error message or adding a comparator in AssertJ must be done before calling the assertion, otherwise, settings will not be taken into account.
recommendation: Place AssertJ methods setting the assertion context before calling the assertion
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability, and ensures that AssertJ settings are taken into account

checks.message: Assertion methods must not be preceded by context-setting methods.
Context-setting methods must be called directly before an assertion.
Context-setting methods such as withFailMessage(), usingComparator(), or describedAs() must come before an assertion method.
